description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a wooden full stock and fore-end, paired with a metallic barrel and receiver. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a smooth, unvented surface and no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The wooden stock and fore-end display a natural wood grain texture, contrasting with the matte metallic finish of the barrel and receiver. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger in a simple, functional design. The pump mechanism is clearly visible beneath the barrel, indicating manual cycling of the action. Overall, the shotgun has a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic pump-action shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, and a long metallic barrel. The design is utilitarian, with a rounded trigger guard and visible pump mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metallic barrel, and the pump mechanism beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel details, with the pump and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long, smooth, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, simple with no finger grooves or reinforcement
